programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the idea of human coexistence with dinosaurs. Had the species not disappeared from the face of earth ages ago, keeping them as pets could have been a possibility.

programme.title: Land of Giants: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Witness the spectacle of the fearsome predator Giganotosaurus.

programme.title: The Giant Claw: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Zoologist Nigel Marvin travels back in time on a prehistoric safari.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring a dinosaur graveyard in Patagonia to gain a better understanding of dinosaur evolution, particularly the Middle Jurassic period when they became gigantic.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Earthshock
programme.desc: With her crew slowly vanishing, Briggs assumes the Doctor to be the guilty party.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Earthshock
programme.desc: The Cybermen are released from their silos and on the march.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Earthshock
programme.desc: The Doctor realises the freighter is now a huge bomb, with one passenger still aboard....

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Time-Flight
programme.desc: When a Concorde passenger jet seemingly vanishes on its final approach to Heathrow Airport, the Doctor is called in to investigate.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Time-Flight
programme.desc: Having been transported 140 million years back into the Jurassic period on Earth, the Doctor must try to work out why the mysterious Kalid has drawn them into this strange domain.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Time-Flight
programme.desc: Deep inside the citadel, the Doctor discovers the legendary Xeraphin who were believed to have been wiped out long ago. They have survived the radiation on Earth by merging themselves into one entity with incredible psychic powers.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Time-Flight
programme.desc: The Doctor must try and return the Concorde passengers back to their own time, but his TARDIS is missing vital components. Will he be able to stop the Master before it's too late? Meanwhile, Tegan is facing a difficult decision about her future.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Arc of Infinity
programme.desc: The Doctor and Nyssa trace something odd to Amsterdam...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Arc of Infinity
programme.desc: Commander Maxil doesn't believe the Doctor is innocent.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Arc of Infinity
programme.desc: Within the Matrix, the Doctor unmasks Omega and realizes the threat is far from over...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Arc of Infinity
programme.desc: Omega has been reborn but as a walking anti-matter bomb.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Snakedance
programme.desc: Tegan falls once more under the influence of the Mara and directs the TARDIS to the planet Manussa - but why? Is it a coincidence that the planet is preparing for a ceremony to celebrate the banishment of the Mara five hundred years earlier?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Snakedance
programme.desc: As the Doctor begins to unravel the legend of the 'Great Crystal', Tegan remains under the Mara's control as it attempts to regain its hold over the planet Manussa.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Snakedance
programme.desc: Still able to influence Tegan from its 'inside world', the Mara set the TARDIS co-ordinates for Manuusa, his home world, where he hopes to re-establish his power.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Snakedance
programme.desc: As the festivities begin, nothing seemingly stands between the Mara and its spectacular return... except the Doctor and a crazy old man in the mountains.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Mawdryn Undead
programme.desc: Caught in a warp ellipse, the TARDIS is drawn to a huge spacecraft orbiting Earth whereupon the Doctor is separated in space and time from Nyssa and Tegan.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Mawdryn Undead
programme.desc: At Brendon School, the Doctor enlists the help of the Brigadier. At Brendon School, Tegan enlists the help of the Brigadier. Same man, different time periods, however.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Mawdryn Undead
programme.desc: Mawdryn and his eternal mutants are awake and reveal the truth, they are exiles, they are in pain and need something only the Doctor can give them. His future lives.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Mawdryn Undead
programme.desc: As the Doctor’s ethics are challenged and the two Brigadier's finally meet, Turlough plots with the Black Guardian to bring the Time Lord down once and for all.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Terminus
programme.desc: A sabotaged TARDIS has to make an emergency landing on a ship that is en route to the derelict space station Terminus. However, the station isn't as derelict as it appears, it's the last stop for the ship's cargo of lepers.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Terminus
programme.desc: Trapped amongst the victims of the highly contagious Lazar's disease, the Doctor and his companions must find a way back to the TARDIS. As Nyssa falls ill, who are the mysterious armoured figures closing in?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Terminus
programme.desc: The Doctor and his companions have reached the Terminus. As they unravel its mysteries, they discover a terrible danger that could threaten the entire Universe!

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Terminus
programme.desc: As Terminus prepares to jettison its reactors, can the Doctor wrest the TARDIS free of the disease-ridden space station or is it truly the end of the Universe?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Enlightenment
programme.desc: The TARDIS's power is drained away just as the Doctor receives a dire warning from the White Guardian, and before long finds himself drawn into a strange race throgh the stars...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Enlightenment
programme.desc: While Tegan has to cope with the unwelcome attention of Marriner, the Doctor realises that Striker and his officers are Eternals and that the human crew mean nothing to them...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Enlightenment
programme.desc: Captain Wrack manipulates Turlough, because she is also working for the Black Guardian and during an Eternals party she places a bomb aboard Striker's ship.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Enlightenment
programme.desc: The race for the Enlightenment is over and a winner has been crowned. But Turlough must make a decision and it's one the Doctor and Tegan cannot help him with...

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A basset hound is afraid of her owner's husband; a blue heeler mix with unique bedtime rituals.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A vicious Chihuahua frightens the pit bulls at the rescue center where he lives.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Wheaten terrier puppy bites when playing; a Jack Russell terrier jumps when the garbage disposal runs and lunges at the dishwasher; a Lab fears shiny floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps dogs overcome their fears including a whippet mix who is blind and deaf, a labradoodle that fears the ocean, and a cocker spaniel that fears all humans.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar meets NASCAR driver Kevin Harvick to help with his snappy Chihuahua and an aggressive Pekingese called Gizmo.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps fitness guru Jillian Michaels with her aggressive Chihuahua, while "Frasier" star Kelsey Grammer needs help house-training his dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Holly, a Labrador puppy, displays severe food aggression; a women's shelter will take a needy woman and her pit bull, Tucker, but Cesar must help the dog become less protective first.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Chihuahua is a pint-sized peril to its owner's roommate; slobbering Great Dane afraid of shiny floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A charmer around people, Opie becomes aggressive around other dogs; Flirt the Chinese Crested is hyper and neurotic.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A vizsla with a biting problem is afraid of everything; a Shetland sheepdog barks at household appliances.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Josh, a Maltese-poodle mix, won't let anyone go near him with a brush; Boomer, a clownish dog, must always be the center of attention.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Harry goes crazy at anything on wheels; shadows drive Brooks crazy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help a boxer named Coach before he is put down for biting someone; Sueki turns her nose up at leads.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help Slick a fear-ridden dog who was rescued after living in a crate for 15 hours a day and Pepper, another rescue dog with issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Ava, a small mixed-breed spins constantly; Gus, a large dog who greets people by throwing its body at them.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Churchill is usually a well-mannered dog, but around other animals he's a monster, and lovable pit bull Maya can be a handful.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar takes the spoiled Bubba down a notch; discover why German shepherd Garret never stops chasing his tail.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Emily, the pit bull, is sent to doggie boot camp because she is so quick to attack other dogs that her owners can no longer walk her.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A rescued mastiff likes to chew everything and barks incessantly; Paris is a temperamental, long-haired Chihuahua.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Linda tries to walk Jake, he goes mad to protect her; Chantel wants to walk her 150-pound rottweiler King.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog juggles his job and family responsibilities at the same time. He leads the search for Robert, a low-level drug dealer. As he hunts down Robert, Dog gets on the phone to tell Beth not to spend too much money to furnish Leland's Honolulu apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Hunting down a fugitive known as "Bozo," Dog gets help from an unexpected source, Bozo's father-in-law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog visits his mother's grave for inspiration before heading out to find Frankie, a violent fugitive hiding in the jungle. The spirit of Ma Chapman seems to help when Dog finds an unusual ally; Frankie's mother.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog lectures high school students about the dangers of drugs before going after Joseph, a dangerous fugitive who won't be easy to capture.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team really have their hands full when they go after a tough guy named Nunu, who leads them on a chase through apartment complexes and a shopping mall before he's finally captured.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's feeling lucky, so he's going to try to capture two women in one day. The first, Moani, has "crazy" tattooed on her neck and is facing drug charges. The second fugitive, Jade, who turns out to be a tough catch, despite help from Jade's sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has problems when he goes to a small town on the Big Island of Hawaii to track down a fugitive. In a small town, everyone knows everyone else's business, making it impossible for Dog to hunt in secret.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team search for Jonah, a violent and desperate criminal facing?20 years in jail. The trail goes stale when Dog runs into evasive family members and an angry girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team go after Kandice, AKA Candy, AKA Suga, a stripper who didn't make her court appearance. They convince one of her friends to lure her to a supermarket parking lot, where Dog has an easy time fetching the fetching young thing. But then

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth take on the heartbreaking case of Rachel. Rachel's mom bailed her out of jail on condition that she go to AA meetings and stick to a curfew. But Rachel hasn't kept up her end of the bargain, and now her mother wants her back to jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is trying to cut down on smoking, but it's not easy with his high-stress job. Today, he must track down Walter, a fugitive who believes that the Canadian military has planted a chip in his teeth that allows him to communicate with his van.

programme.title: Walks With My Dog
programme.desc: Adventurer Ben Fogle is on one of his favourite dog walks, along the tranquil banks of the River Thames, with his black lab Storm.

programme.title: The Super Retriever Series Crown Championship
programme.desc: The Super Retriever Series Crown Championship features the best in hunting retrievers in the Semifinal competition and dogs on the SRS Super dock in the final competition.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Alan Davies returns for what’s set to be an even bigger and better third series of The Dog Rescuers.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Beverley Mahood meets with couple Mike and Kian, who are looking for a puppy to symbolize a fresh start after a tragic house fire. Kian and Mike visit, the Weimaraner, the English Springer Spaniel and the Doberman Pinscher. They each have their top …

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The smith family is looking for their very first family dog. Who knows which one they will pick after visiting with the Linnois, the Barbet and the Cairn-Westie Cross.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian Norton tries to save Millie, a much-loved farm dog and an albino wallaby called Albert. Peter Wright has his hands full with a cheeky pygmy goat called Charlie. Other patients include a hedgehog called Monster.

programme.title: To The Rescue

programme.desc: Dog drives car; guinea pig walks around with castle on his head; cat wants backrub too.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog drives cat off couch; Dog against fish; small and big dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, more than a dozen children in Seattle, Washington, were fighting for their lives. Each one of them had contracted a serious unknown illness. After one died, investigators knew the clock was ticking.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests low-level drug dealer James Wren, who confesses. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators question the authenticity of the confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police suspect Dr. John "Jack" Boyle in the disappearance of his wife, Noreen, when he signs mortgage papers for a new house with a woman pretending to be his spouse. The police later find Noreen's body in the basement of Dr. Boyle's new house.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.desc: Nature's butchers, living on the wildest side of life, feeding on blood, bone and guts; This eclectic group of creatures is endowed with the ability not only to hunt their victims but even to disembowel them.

programme.title: Ghost Killers
programme.desc: As nocturnal birds of prey, owls count on legendary hunting senses; their ability to hear, see, and fly in the dark makes them exceptional predators with a crucial ecological importance.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: The blonde manes of golden snub-nose monkeys; pink flamingo feathers brought on by an all-crustacean diet; the markings of gemsboks and cheetahs.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: A gorilla wrestling match, pushy moose antlers, long pelican bills that snap at any enemy within range, and a megashark's stereo sniffer.

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: Pests are a reality of the natural world, and there is always someone willing to do the dirty, but beneficial, work of restoring the balance.

programme.title: Wild Workers
programme.desc: Nature's butchers, living on the wildest side of life, feeding on blood, bone and guts; This eclectic group of creatures is endowed with the ability not only to hunt their victims but even to disembowel them.

programme.title: Empire of the Vineyard
programme.desc: Choose sides in the animal battles that rage all around the best-tended vines.

programme.title: Kenya Wildlife Diaries
programme.desc: Lewa Conservacy is working to protect the Grévy's zebras population.

programme.title: Siberia's Wild Year
programme.desc: Only the hardiest animals are capable of carving out a life in Siberia. From the ice-covered shores of the north, across miles of barren tundra, to the depths of the taiga forest, animals must face incredible challenges and fight for survival.

programme.title: Inside the Pack
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #21: The Last Job
programme.desc: Lupin and his companions have their sights on a Japanese cultural treasure, a priceless Buddha statue. But when a mysterious group of ninja thieves get the jump on them, it might just be the gang's last job!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: The Hida Speedway has been completed and Lupin is looking to take top prize at the first race. The race is actually a trap designed by the Scorpion Gang who are intent on killing Lupin and eliminating all criminal competition.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko has stolen something from a man named Pycal, and he wants it back. Pycal is a magician who is able to shoot flames from his hands, walk on air, and deflect bullets with ease. Lupin goes up against Pycal in hopes of saving Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A boat collision ruins Lupin and Fujiko's quiet boating expedition. They discover a woman named Linda in the other boat just as gunmen on a larger boat attack them.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko successfully pull off a heist; that is until Zenigata manages to shoot Lupin with a tranquilizer dart. Zenigata hauls Lupin off to jail. Despite Fujiko's best efforts, she cannot break Lupin out of prison.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of some quick gunplay by his partner Jigen, Lupin takes on the world in elaborate heists, classic car chases, and nasty explosions. Fujiko, a buxom redhead with a penchant for betrayal, always gets tangled up in Lupin's capers.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: One rainy afternoon, a man seeks Lupin's help on behalf of a young woman. The woman is actually Fujiko, who is after a diamond known as "The Star of Killamanjaro". The diamond was implanted into the chest of a mob boss.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Three scrolls contain the secret of creating a blade like the Zantetsuken. Lupin wants to steal them as a matter of family pride because his grandfather, Arsene Lupin, stole them back in the 19th century.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Napoleon once owned a deck of fortune-telling cards that are now in the hands of a millionaire known as Mr. Gold. Lupin plans to steal them during Mr. Gold's birthday party, and Zenigata plans to stop him. Lupin succeeds in stealing the mysterious cards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang aim to steal the blueprints for a new computer. In their way is a man skilled with the machinegun and his hit-man partner named Poon, who used to be Fujiko's partner in the past.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Baron Ukraine are both after the world's most skilled counterfeiter. Lupin would have no problem beating the Baron, but the Baron has hired a man called Flinch along with Fujiko and gave them instructions to kill Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is posing as Lupin and blowing up bridges, causing a lot of damage and injuries. Lupin and Jigen discover that the bomber is trying to force an armored car to travel along a route of his choosing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Baron Ukraine are both after the world's most skilled counterfeiter. Lupin would have no problem beating the Baron, but the Baron has hired a man called Flinch along with Fujiko and gave them instructions to kill Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Mamo Kyosuke claims that Lupin will disappear from the world in four days. He claims that he is a time traveler from 2874 seeking revenge. Apparently, Lupin XIII destroyed the Mamo clan on March 2874.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are both after the legendary Eye of the Nile emerald. It is going to be a wedding gift presented at a wedding being held on a yacht.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Zenigata has been invited to an international police convention in Europe; his chief wants him to go, but Zenigata does not want to since Lupin has declared that he will steal a gold bust within the next three days.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko goads Lupin into stealing a large shipment of diamonds. Lupin takes the task despite Jigen's protest that Fujiko is playing them for fools. Of course, Jigen is right.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko invites Lupin and the gang to a famous nightclub owned by the sexy Hoshikage Rinko. Only Goemon refuses. This was a wise move as Rinko places timebombs on Fujiko, Jigen, and Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Smith is an art thief that is selling stolen paintings under the guise of a beauty contest. Lupin decides he wants in on the action as well, promising to steal away the treasured paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Inspector Ganimard III is the grandson of Lupin I's archnemesis. He has come to Japan as the head of security for the 1972 France Fair but also intends to restore his family's honor by arresting Lupin III.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is committing thefts under Lupin's name. Lupin follows the imposters back to their island hideout. He has apparently stumbled into a whole island of thieves.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Rie is being held captive though she does not realize it. She believes the man holding her is a friend of her father, Ken Makita. Lupin shows up to rescue her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Gordon, an FBI computer specialist, is in Japan to operate a computer capable of predicting crimes and determining how to stop them. The Metropolitan Police Department hopes that this will finally help them capture Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A disputed horde of recently discovered ancient gold coins draws the attention of Lupin and company. As the ownership of the coins is disputed, Lupin decides to settle the matter on his own by stealing them from the Dai Nippon Bank.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Ana recibe a su fantasma más toxico y a Fraag lo "ghostean". El sexo de reconciliacion de Asaf y Lilian dura más que su proxima pelea. Valentino y Alex gritan su amor. Valeria se despide de la Villa. Diana y Chava son la pareja del momento.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana se asocia con sus dos amores. El deseo de Queen se cumple pero el precio a pagar por el es caro. Una Love Suite causa polemica. Asaf cae en la tentacion y Lilian elije a Bryan para vengarse. La Sala Tornado revela las mentiras de la Villa.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todo lo que empieza tiene que terminar y así pasa con estas vacaciones en las costas del mediterráneo. Llega la hora en que los chicos de Súper Shore deberán de despedirse.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos repasan los mejores momentos de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Ellos verán las mejores fiestas, las peleas, los momentos más importantes de sus vacaciones y lo que eso conlleva

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Nuevas vacaciones comienzan para la familia más disfuncional. Serán en Rimini, Italia la tierra de la matadora de Italia, Elettra.El primer episodio sorprende a los Shores con muchos cambios dentro de la familia y con una casa espectacular.

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.desc: En este nuevo episodio los shores se reúnen para hablar de los mejores momentos que vivieron en sus vacaciones.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Intentando juntar los pedazos del espejo roto, las crudas morales y los resentimientos se hacen presentes entre los solteros. Por la noche, una Ceremonia de Elección más y el deseo de prender el máximo de luces.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Después de tantas peleas y amores, malentendidos y amistades, citas románticas y ceremonias, los solteros acumulan recuerdos memorables y muchos aprendizajes. La experiencia les enseña, pero igual los pone a prueba.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock must break a seemingly perfect defense when Arthur Hampton, a blind sculptor, shoots the man responsible for his loss of sight. After waiting many years, Hampton finally takes his revenge on Clay Graham, the playboy responsible for his blindness.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock treads on unfamiliar turf when he spearheads an investigation to defend a popular wrestler, known as The Annihilator when he is accused of killing Sailor Jack, his nemesis in the ring.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock’s professional curiosity can’t help but get him involved in Michelle’s defense of Diane Benson, one of three women who were married to the same murdered man.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock finds himself in a legal dilemma: his client stuns the courtroom with a confession, and then, saying that government agents had persuaded her to do so, tries to recant it.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock defends Paul J. Bartel, a top TV producer accused of murdering the programming chief at the top-rated network, and finds the case has more twists than most Hollywood scripts.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a renowned author is murdered, Matlock defends the accused – the subject of a biography the victim was writing – only to encounter a disturbing revelation about his client midway through the trial.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A law school class reunion proves deadly for one of Matlock’s former classmates, and Ben takes on the defense of another old friend, George Dutton, the partner of the victim.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock attempts to defend Charlie Bonham, a softball coach who is accused of killing the umpire – who was also his boss – during the league’s playoff game.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: On today's Steve Wilkos, will the lie detector results reveal if Tamisha and Simone's men were faithful? Or will it reveal some more sinister results?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her 10 month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sarah and Gaylon are 17 with a 7-month-old daughter. Gaylon has paternity doubts because Sarah admitted to sleeping with two other men before she became pregnant! His mother wants him to take a DNA test to move on with his life!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Lianna and Devone have been married for a year, but she suspects Devone of being unfaithful because he stays out all night and is rarely home. Then, Kya is out on a $50,000 bond for allegedly abusing her newborn son, but did she do it?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Heather received a message from Alisha saying that she was pregnant with Remondo's baby but Remondo is Heather's boyfriend! Plus, Silvina and Clee'chaun have been in a relationship for almost 10 years and they've never met in person!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: At 13 years old, Meghan had issues with alcohol and is now into harder drugs. Then, Raven claims she lost her virginity to Joe and hasn't slept with anyone else, but Joe has heard rumors that he's not the only person she slept with.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Deon believes that Cassandra has been having sex with Josh and that she may be pregnant with his child! Next, Shawn believes his wife, Jamie, cheated on him with his brother. Jamie blacked out during a night of drinking and does not remember.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Nicky and Carissa have been on and off for 8-years, and Donald thinks she's still seeing Nicky. Then Chastity suffered a miscarriage and discovered Sean cheated, but now he says she's cheating with his relatives!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: We'll revisit the wildest and most outrageous teens! 19-year old Tay slept with Kyle once and got pregnant. Then, wild party girl Hanna, met John when she was 19 and cheated on him twice, both times when she conceived her 2 kids. Who are the dads?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With My Daughter's Girlfriend
programme.desc: These women are desperate to hear MAURY say the words “YOU ARE THE FATHER!” But these men want to hear him say “YOU ARE NOT THE FATHER!” But only MAURY’s got the results they’re looking for!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, Don and Amy are back for another lie detector test! This time Don wants to know if Amy is sleeping with his brother! Will they ace their tests?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These women are here with some burning questions! Kendra wants her husband Richard to admit he’s the father of their child AND his mistress’ child! Jevon and his family don’t think he’s the father of Jazmine’s child! Only MAURY has the answers!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve's looking back on some of the funniest moments from his show. You'll definitely laugh out loud at these unforgettable guests. Don't miss one second of the fun on today's Steve Wilkos Show.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Callista has been living with a horrible rumor about her estranged father Franco. He has no idea what he has been accused of and wants to prove that he's not a monster. Find out what the rumor is and if they'll ever have a relationship.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save her from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Nichelle’s here to stop her cousin Talibah from marrying Tyisha. Nick tells Chelsea that he was born a woman.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Devon entró en coma y está conectado a un sistema de soporte vital. Antes de caer en coma, le dijo a su madre que su ex, Alisha, le dijo que no era el padre de su hijo. Alisha niega haber dicho esto y siente que toda su familia le ha dado la espalda.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kelsey dice que su marido la maltrata. Malcolm cree que Kelsey le ha sido infiel desde el principio y que sus dos hijos pueden ser de otro hombre. Además, el novio de Carrie, Chris, cree que su hijo es de su ex.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Curtis se sentó con su madre Telisha, y le dijo que está tratando de tener un bebé, pero Telisha se horrorizó y se preocupó porque Curtis apenas tiene 13 años. Curtis asegura que está listo para ser padre.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Russell quiere volver a reunir a su familia luego de que sus 3 hijos murieron en un incendio. Después, Tatiana cree que su sobrino de 2 años sufrió abusos. Además, acusa al ex-prometido de su hermana, Chris. Chris dice que no es un abusador.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desmond cree que su ex, Cassandra, está inventando todo un cuento de que él ha tocado a su hijo porque está celosa de su nueva prometida. Después, Tammy ha sido investigada por abuso infantil e incluso acusada de encerrar a sus hijos en un armario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Megan quería saber si su novio Devin era infiel. ¡Pero salieron a la luz secretos de relaciones aún peores! Además, te sorprenderá saber por qué Laura y Steven necesitan que Steve los ayude otra vez.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dio a luz a un niño y cree que Brandon es el padre. Pero Brandon afirma que no supo del niño hasta tres años después y niega ser el padre. Stephanie y su mamá quieren que Brandon se haga cargo.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Deshawn afirma que su ex Lynette abandonó a su hijo de 5 años. Pero ella afirma que él la está alejando de su hijo. Sin embargo, Deshawn se enteró recientemente de que no está en el certificado de nacimiento de su hijo, ¡así que quiere una prueba de ADN!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Thornton dice que no puede confiar en su novia infiel Crystal y quiere que se someta al detector de mentiras. Además, Stephanie quiere demostrarle a su marido, Mathew, que no está teniendo sexo con un miembro de su familia.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dice que desde que llegó a casa del trabajo y encontró a su hijo de un año con un ojo morado, ha temido que la niñera de sus hijos los lastime. La niñera Cheryl niega las graves acusaciones acerca del niño.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La relación de dos años de Anastasia y Robert terminó cuando él escuchó rumores de que ella le era infiel. Ella dice que siempre le ha sido fiel, pero Robert no le cree y ahora duda que sea el padre de su bebé recién nacido.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Aeshia ha venido a demostrar a Terrence y a su esposa Lashondra que Terrence es el padre de su hijo, pero Lashondra sabe que se equivoca. Tanto Shaunah como Chris se han convencido de que les son infieles. ¿Quién es el padre?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¡Kristy quiere que su madre, Donna, le devuelva su bebé! Donna afirma que se llevó al bebé porque nació con graves discapacidades debido a que Kristy consumió drogas durante el embarazo. ¿Quién está mintiendo?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy continues his rescue mission, Nami learns a lesson about how to turn rain into cash, and Franky wakes up in a freezing forest full of ferocious cyborg animals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji tries to fight his way off a most peculiar island, but his frilly battle costume threatens to awaken his inner maiden. Elsewhere, Chopper tries to avoid being served in a hot pot!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico Robin lends her many hands to an overmatched gang of revolutionaries in a frigid land of eternal suffering, and Usopp bulks up to avoid becoming a snack for a hungry, hungry island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro's attempt to reunite with his friends leads him to a massive tomb and a host of shadowy swordsmen. Elsewhere, Brook uses his status as Satan to get an eyeful of undergarments!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the marines prepare for Ace's execution, Luffy looks back on all the good times he shared with his brother, and Jimbei reveals the shocking details of the day Fire Fist Ace went down in defeat!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his gang continue on their way to Marineford, but once he arrives, the rubber-man must defeat both Navy Admirals and Warlords of the Sea before he can save Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Citizens and soldiers alike prepare for all-out war as Ace is led to the site of his execution. While the world watches, the true identity of the condemned man's father is shockingly revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Flashbacks reveal the agonizing sacrifice made by Ace's mother in order save his life – and the secret behind his connection to Luffy. Back in the present, Whitebeard makes an unexpected entrance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As a massive seaquake rocks Marineford, Ace recalls the ups and downs of his life as a pirate, including his first encounter with Whitebeard – and the unthinkable betrayal that led to his capture!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard begins his attack with a tsunami-spawning sea quake, but the marines counter with a blast of frigid air that turns the tidal wave into an iceberg! Will Luffy and his crew arrive in time to join the battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fire meets ice as mythical warriors, erupting admirals, legendary pirates, and a giant giant go head to head in the biggest, baddest battle of all time! There's only one thing missing: Monkey D. Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A towering giant of a giant known as Little Oars Jr. carves a path of death and destruction as he fights to save Ace. The monstrous mauler is within arm's reach of his friend when he's intercepted by the seven warlords of the sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the wake of Little Oars Junior's tragic defeat, Admiral Sengoku hatches a devious plan to speed up the countdown to Ace's execution. The situation looks beyond bleak until a hero enters the fray from on high!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy appears on the field of battle with a ferocious sense of urgency. Ace could be executed at any minute, and the rubber-man's refusal to back down impresses even the most feared men in all the world!

programme.desc: Luffy leaps into action, attacking the Naval forces with a frantic display of brutality. Meanwhile, Ace watches in horror as an army of zombies rises up to attack his brother!

programme.desc: Supernatural powers take center stage in the battle to save Ace as Luffy and his uniquely talented allies throw down with the Navy's own arsenal of Devil Fruit Eaters!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his pirate brethren have their hands full with an ominous army of unbeatable Kumas! While the inhuman minions march onward, Whitebeard encounters a former ally!

programme.desc: With the ice melting beneath his feet, Luffy begins a desperate final charge towards his soon-to-be-executed brother. Should his rescue attempt fail, death will surely embrace them both!

programme.desc: Crocodile's unexpected assistance creates an opening for Luffy to advance, and Whitebeard has a surprise lurking beneath the ice that might swing the momentum in favor of the pirates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle rages on and the bodies pile up as Whitebeard squares off against an Admiral, Luffy gets knocked cold, and the legendary Vice-Admiral Garp finally enters the fray!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While awaiting his execution, Ace flashes back to a troubled youth seeking the truth about his father. Meanwhile, Luffy begs Ivan for a potentially-deadly treatment that will allow him to continue fighting!

programme.desc: Whitebeard struggles to withstand the full force of the Marine onslaught. With the executioner's swords hovering above Ace's head, Straw Hat Luffy discovers a new ability!

programme.title: The Green Hornet

programme.title: Hot Pursuit

programme.title: Without A Trace

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the son of a well-known retired FBI agent is taken just blocks from their home in what appears to be a revenge kidnapping, the team must uncover if it's tied to the agent's past or trouble the son has gotten into on his own.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a U.S. attorney is found dead steps away from the body of a private escort, the team must piece together what connected the two seemingly random victims.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a truck filled with armor-piercing rifles is hijacked, the team works to discover who stole it, and what they have planned for the stolen weapons.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After the police ignore a desperate father's plea for help, he abducts a billionaire's daughter and holds her hostage in a near-impenetrable safe room until his own missing child is returned to him.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the team is called to the scene of a murder, they quickly suspect political motivation, but when another murder occurs, they work to uncover a common thread before more bodies pile up.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team search for a serial killer who is targeting men that hire prostitutes.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team are put in the limelight when they search for jewels that go missing during an awards braodcast and Larry returns from his adventure.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team investigate the mysterious death of two men who were part of a group of friends that had been sexually abused by one of their teachers.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: After Charlie and Amita get married, the team turns its attention to tracking down Don's gun after it goes missing.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Agent Colby Granger lands in prison after the discovery that he was a mole within the FBI, but he escapes, and it's up to Don and his team to track him down and uncover the truth on the fourth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A typical morning at a coffee shop turns into a nightmare when a car collides into it, leaving one person dead and many injured. But what appears to be a car's accidental loss of control is soon exposed to be more.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A series of secrets and blackmail involving a young, up and coming actor are exposed when Don and his team investigate the murder of a young woman in his Hollywood Hills mansion.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack's squad looks for a young, idealistic and dedicated schoolteacher, Josh Abrams (CHRISTOPHER GORHAM), who disappeared after teaching a night class in the Bronx.

programme.title: Thunderheart
programme.desc: Val Kilmer, Sam Shepard and Graham Greene star in this murder mystery filled with style and suspense. Kilmer stars as Ray Levoi, a hotshot FBI agent who's thrust into a strange new world when he is sent to solve a murder on an Indian reservation.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Sin City: A Dame To Kill For
programme.desc: Some of Sin City's most hard-boiled citizens cross paths with a few of its more reviled inhabitants.

programme.title: Next of Kin
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: Jamesy Boy
programme.desc: Rage-filled teenager James is never one to back down from a fight. He jumps at the chance to run drugs and guns for a gang and quickly ends up behind bars.

programme.title: The Kill Room
programme.desc: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin into an overnight avant-garde sensation, one that forces her to play the art world against the underworld.

programme.title: Bad Ass
programme.desc: A Vietnam veteran who becomes a local hero after saving a man from attackers on a city bus decides to take action when his best friend is murdered and the police show little interest in solving the crime.

programme.title: Bad Ass 2: Bad Asses
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo) teams up with grumpy old agoraphobic Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) to kick ass and clean up the streets of L.A.

programme.title: Bad Ass 3: Bad Asses on the Bayou
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo)) and Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) return, this time to Louisiana in an attempt to find a kidnapped friend.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: In this thrilling cult classic, two dangerous outlaw brothers head out on a wild crime spree. After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the bad guys head to a seedy Mexican bar for safety but come face to face with blood-sucking vampires.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 2: Texas Blood Money
programme.desc: When a gang of bank robbers makes a run for the border, they wander into the wrong bar and mess with the wrong vampires. It's kill-or-be-killed in the ultimate battle to stop these evil creatures and save their own lives!

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 3: Hangman's Daughter
programme.desc: Set in Mexico in the early 1900s, this prequel to the From Dusk Till Dawn series finds outlaw Johnny Madrid on the run from the hangman, with the hangman's daughter Esmeralda by his side. Together they are faced with the fight of their lives.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: A graduate student and his girlfriend set out on a cross-country road trip to research a book they are writing on serial killers. Along the way, they pick up an ex-con and his girlfriend who will take them on a ride they'll never forget.

programme.title: Only the Brave
programme.desc: Only the Brave, based on the true story of the Granite Mountain Hotshots, is the heroic story of a team of local firefighters who – through hope, determination, and sacrifice – become one of the most elite firefighting teams in the nation.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as a brash Navy lawyer who's teamed with a gung-ho litigator (Demi Moore) in a politically explosive murder case, defending two Marines accused of killing a fellow soldier

programme.title: Flags Of Our Fathers

programme.title: Remember
programme.desc: Everything is not what it seems in this riveting revenge thriller, where a relentless man will stop at nothing to find and kill the Nazi officer who murdered his family 70 years earlier in WWII.

programme.title: Krisha
programme.desc: Tensions rise at a Thanksgiving gathering when Krisha shows up at her sister's Texas home and reunites with the extended family that she abandoned years earlier in an emotionally charged familial reckoning.

programme.title: The Ides of March
programme.desc: Ambition seduces and power corrupts in a nerve-wracking thriller from Academy Award nominated director George Clooney (Good Night, and Good Luck). Rating: R

programme.desc: The family’s future grows bleak when the no-good nanny marries Fester and has the kids shipped off to summer camp. But Wednesday still has a Thing or two up her sleeve.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympus
programme.desc: There are many more worlds in our solar system than just the planets. The mysterious moons of the gas giants may hold much more than we ever imagined. Each one is unique, and each one deserves a scrutinous eye.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Danger, Asteroids Ahead
programme.desc: The threat of an asteroid strike is a very real danger in our solar system, mankind is now in a position to defend the planet from such an eventuality.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Emissiaries
programme.desc: NASA and others are developing new innovative propulsion systems, Ion thrusters, solar sails and the science fiction 'Warp drive' is not as far away as once thought.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: The life cycle of stars reveal to us the past and the future of Earth and ourselves.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Dark Side
programme.desc: In terms of the Universe, we know we don't know much, especially when it comes to dark matter and dark energy. Scientists are devoting so much of their time to discovering as much as the possibly can about this mysterious matter.

programme.title: Engineering Connections
programme.desc: Richard Hammond reveals the ingenious engineering required to transport one of the most potentially hazardous cargoes in the world in some of the biggest vessels afloat.

programme.title: Engineering Connections
programme.desc: Richard Hammond reveals how engineers made one of the longest bridges in the world earthquake-proof. The Gulf of Corinth slices deep into mainland Greece.

programme.title: Engineering Connections
programme.desc: Richard Hammond reveals the surprising engineering connections in NASA’s Space Shuttle – the world’s first reusable spacecraft.

programme.title: Engineering Connections
programme.desc: Richard Hammond reveals the surprising engineering connections behind the glamorous appearances of the Formula 1 car.

programme.title: Engineering Connections
programme.desc: Richard Hammond checks out the world’s tallest and most distinctively shaped hotel – the 320 metre high Burj al Arab, or Arabian Tower.

programme.title: Engineering Connections
programme.desc: Richard Hammond reveals the surprising engineering connections in Japan’s Bullet Train – the world’s first high-speed train.

programme.title: Megastructures
programme.desc: China has erected some of the greatest monuments on Earth. When they held the Olympic Games in Beijing, the main stadium was a feat of architectural beauty. It was up to engineers to design the Beijing Water Cube to match it.

programme.title: SMOKE
programme.desc: The lives of a unique group of people intertwine after a New York cigar store manager named Auggie befriends them. This acclaimed, offbeat comedy features an all-star cast, and a mix of unexpected wit and reverence.

programme.title: BLUE IN THE FACE
programme.desc: A wacky group of locals visits the neighborhood cigar shop looking for good times and plenty of hilarious fun. But when the greedy owner threatens to close the shop for good, the neighborhood proves they'll do anything to save their favorite hangout.

programme.title: Slam Dance
programme.desc: A cartoonist and painter (Tom Hulce) must dig through the underbelly of the L.A. club scene when his ex-girlfriend (Virginia Madsen) is found dead and he is framed for the murder.

programme.title: Only Lovers Left Alive
programme.desc: Driven by sensual photography, trance-like music, and droll humor, Jim Jarmusch’s ONLY LOVERS LEFT ALIVE is a meditation on art, science, and the mysteries of everlasting love.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: Winona Ryder, Christian Slater, and Shannen Doherty star in this cruelly hilarious dark comedy, which became one of the biggest cult classics of the `80s.

programme.title: Pain & Gain
programme.desc: When an ambitious group of personal trainers go after the American Dream, they get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong. Now, living large will take everything they've got in this unbelievable and outrageous true story.

programme.title: Southland Tales
programme.desc: SOUTHLAND TALES is an ensemble piece set in the futuristic landscape of Los Angeles, as it stands on the brink of social, economic and environmental disaster. Boxer Santaros (Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson) is an action star who's stricken with amnesia.

programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: After arriving at New York's JFK airport, Viktor Navorski gets unwittingly caught in bureaucratic glitches that make it impossible for him to return to his home country or enter the U.S.

programme.title: Up in the Air
programme.desc: Ryan (George Clooney) flies all over for work, but after meeting a passenger he learns that life isn't about the journey, but the connections we make along the way.

programme.title: Red Eye
programme.desc: Moments after takeoff, Lisa's seatmate, Jackson, menacingly reveals the real reason he's on board: He is an operative in a plot to kill a rich and powerful businessman .... And Lisa is the key to its success.

programme.title: Up in the Air

programme.title: Deliver Us from Evil
programme.desc: A NYPD officer (Eric Bana) and unconventional priest Mendoza (Edgar Ramírez) who join forces to investigate a series of disturbing & inexplicable crimes. Together, they must combat the possessions that are terrorizing their city before it's too late.

programme.title: Grace: The Possession
programme.desc: Grace is a naive college freshman trying to deal with campus culture and her outgoing new roommate. But when a demon takes over her body and unleashes chaos, Grace returns to the cold clutches of her grandmother and the strict rules of the church.

programme.title: The Last Exorcism Part II
programme.desc: Nell is back in the safety of civilization and sent to live in a group home where she's encouraged to leave her past behind and start a new life. Just as Nell settles in, she is tormented by the seductive demonic presence that once possessed her.

programme.title: Faceless After Dark
programme.desc: Following her breakout success as the star of a killer clown horror flick, Bowie now finds herself struggling to capitalize on its success. But when she is held hostage by an unhinged fan posing as that same killer clown, horror becomes her reality.

programme.title: Soul Survivors
programme.desc:
Following a horrible car accident, a beautiful college freshman finds herself trapped in a twilight world somewhere between life and death in this haunting supernatural thriller. Casey Affleck, Luke Wilson, Eliza Dushku
Rated PG-13

programme.title: The Faculty
programme.desc: A group of small-town high school students discovers their teachers are under the control of mind-controlling alien parasites. From a smart script by Kevin Williamson (SCREAM), and directed by action-expert Robert Rodriguez (FROM DUSK TO DAWN).

programme.title: Disturbing Behavior
programme.desc: When the Clark Family moves from Chicago to Cradle Bay, Steve is cautioned by Gavin Strick about the separating factions at the local high school, where the Blue Ribbons, a club of robotic perfect students, rule.

programme.title: The Amityville Horror (2005)
programme.desc: Based on the original movie, this modern remake tells the true story about a large house on the coast of Long Island where a newlywed couple and their three children move into, unaware that a murder took place in the house several years back.

programme.title: Pain & Gain
programme.desc: When an ambitious group of personal trainers go after the American Dream, they get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong. Now, living large will take everything they've got in this unbelievable and outrageous true story.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: Locke
programme.desc: A man's (Tom Hardy) life unravels after he leaves a construction site at a critical time and drives to London to be present for the birth of a child conceived during a one-night stand.

programme.title: Killer Elite
programme.desc: A special-ops agent must rescue his mentor.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: Adam is a glum professor who has grown disinterested by his ordinary life. When he discovers a man who appears to be his double, the lives of the identical men become bizarrely, hauntingly intertwined. In the end, only one man can survive.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Travel to the centers of wealth, power, industry, and innovation. From London to Tokyo, Hong Kong to New York, these are the cities that never sleep. The influence held in these economic hubs unites the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Some of the most stunning cities are port cities - Sydney, Rio, Cape Town - and are also some of the most culturally diverse and vibrant. The great maritime cities of the world bridge countries and continents and unite the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Rivers flow freely - beautiful and powerful waterways that underscore the melody of life. As they meander through the landscape, they shape it, wearing down ranges and deepening valleys, eventually flowing out into the sea.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Our experience of the world’s greatest marvels is literally and figuratively elevated when we explore them from the air. Whether you travel by air balloon, helicopter, light aircraft, a grand perspective is always guaranteed.

programme.title: World's Greatest

programme.title: The Travel Bug

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The scorching battle between Ash and Harrison rages on, with Charizard taking on Blaziken, a Pokémon from the Hoenn region!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The Hoenn region is on Ash's mind, and he's preparing to board a ship bound there when Team Rocket strikes! With Pikachu missing and time running out before the boat leaves, can Ash get his adventure back on track?

programme.desc: Ash Ketchum, a 10-year-old from Pallet Town, is finally old enough to receive his first Pokémon! However, he oversleeps, and the only remaining Pokémon at Professor Oak’s lab is a strong-willed Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash rushes into Viridian City with his wounded Pikachu, where he encounters Jessie, James, and Meowth of Team Rocket, as well as Misty, who’s angry about Ash wrecking her bike!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: A scientist leads Ash and his friends deep into Mt. Moon to find the storied Moon Stone, which is said to increase the power of Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash meets some students, who are bullying their classmate Joe. Joe insists the rough treatment is necessary so he’ll be strong enough to graduate. Ash doesn’t agree.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Completely lost, our heroes reach a village not shown on their map. This quiet place is inhabited by Pokémon that have been injured in battle or abandoned by their Trainers.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash and his friends walk along a path and fall into a hole dug by a group of mischievous Squirtle. Why is the Squirtle Squad such a menace to the local population?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash and his friends board the cruise ship St. Anne, thanks to tickets provided by Jessie and James in disguise. Their latest plan is to lure Pokémon Trainers onto the ship and steal their Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: A powerful storm forces everyone except Team Rocket and our heroes to abandon the sinking St. Anne. Ash, Brock, and Misty must team up with their enemies to survive this sticky situation!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica

programme.title: ¡Alto! Frontera

programme.title: Leyendas urbanas

programme.title: Leyendas urbanas
programme.desc: Una mujer es atormentada por una persona que llama y no deja el mensaje. Una mujer conoce a los padres de su novio por primera vez y la casa de una madre se convierte en un infierno viviente.

programme.title: Leyendas urbanas

programme.title: Leyendas urbanas
programme.desc: El vestido de fiesta de una mujer es un éxito, pero no para bien; una pareja descubre el significado de "dar hasta que duela"; y una mujer recibe un trasplante de corazón y pulmón que le da más de lo que esperaba.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A seemingly harmless orb from a dead world is brought back to the base through the Stargate, but the strange device infects O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) with an alien organism. Now, the only chance to save him is to let the organism control him!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Stargate project is imperiled when a reporter threatens to expose the top-secret portal. O'Neill attempts to stop him while the rest of the team tries to save Jackson's wife who has been impregnated with a Goa'uld. Is this the end of Stargate?

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: La patrona
